temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit kitchen, Ross sits at a counter, holding a handwritten note. He looks down at it with a concerned expression. Behind him, Joey leans in, his face filled with shock and disbelief as he watches Ross. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense moment where Ross is about to reveal something written on a note, and Joey's reaction suggests it's a significant and possibly negative development.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, hushed. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) Ross holds up the note, which reads 'I'm sorry, but I can't make it tonight.' He looks at Joey with a pleading expression, gesturing with his hands as he explains the situation. Joey stands over him, still looking shocked. (Storyline: Ross is trying to justify a note he received, likely from Joey's ex-girlfriend, which explains why she can't meet up. Joey's disbelief grows as he processes the information.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Exasperated, defensive. 2) Background sounds or music: A laugh track plays as Joey reacts.)
(00:06-00:08) Joey, looking furious, interrupts Ross. He grabs the note from Ross's hand and throws it down on the counter, his face contorted in anger and disbelief. Ross looks on, startled by Joey's outburst. (Storyline: Joey's frustration boils over. He is not just shocked, but angry that Ross is bringing up the note, which he clearly wants to keep private. The power dynamic shifts as Joey takes control of the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Angry, loud. 2) Background sounds or music: The laugh track continues, indicating a comedic beat in the argument.)
